title: High error rate on checkout service
description: Error rate above 5% threshold — rollback proposed but confidence 0.7 < 0.85 → blocked

title: 5xx spike on payment processor
description: Severe error rate — same heuristic path, still blocked

title: Error rate detected on order service
description: Just above threshold — rollback blocked

title: High error rate alert triggered
description: Mixed signals — error_rate takes priority over latency

title: Deploy failure on staging environment
description: Deploy failure → rollback proposed, blocked due to low confidence

title: Deployment rollout failed on production
description: Production deploy failure — same path

title: Canary deploy failure detected
description: Deploy failure takes priority over error_rate signal

title: CI/CD pipeline deploy failed
description: Minimal signals — deploy_failed is enough to classify

title: Latency spike on payment service
description: High latency → scale_up (non-destructive, confidence 0.72) → allowed

title: P99 latency degradation on checkout
description: Severe latency — scale_up allowed

title: Slow response times on search service
description: Just above 1500ms threshold

title: Latency spike detected on API gateway
description: Extreme latency — scale_up still the right call

title: Database CPU overload on checkout-db
description: DB overload → no strong heuristic action → noop (safe)

title: Database connection pool exhausted
description: Connection pool issue — heuristic defaults to noop

title: High database load detected
description: Moderate DB load — noop is the safe choice

title: Database query latency spike
description: Mixed DB signals — noop

title: OOM killed on worker pod
description: OOM → no confident heuristic action → noop

title: Container OOM restart loop detected
description: Repeated OOM restarts — noop without high confidence

title: Memory limit exceeded on search pods
description: OOM with memory details — still noop

title: Unusual metric pattern detected
description: No recognizable signal pattern → unknown class → noop

title: Anomaly detected in telemetry
description: Unknown signal type — noop

title: System alert triggered
description: Empty signals — unknown class → noop
